items.title: Treason Felony Act 1848
items.description: An Act for the better Security of the Crown and Government of the United Kingdom.

items.title: Hares Act 1848 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to enable Persons having a Right to kill Hares in England and Wales to do so, by themselves or Persons authorized by them, without being required to take out a Game Certificate.

items.title: Hares (Scotland) Act 1848 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to enable all Persons having at present a Right to kill Hares in Scotland to do so themselves, or by Persons authorized by them, without being required to take out a Game Certificate.

items.title: Entail Amendment Act 1848
items.description: An Act for the Amendment of the Law of Entail in Scotland.

items.title: Indictable Offences Act 1848
items.description: An Act to facilitate the Performance of the Duties of Justices of the Peace out of Sessions within England and Wales with respect to Persons charged with indictable Offences.

items.title: Paymaster General Act 1848
items.description: An Act for consolidating the Offices of Paymasters of Exchequer Bills and Paymaster of Civil Services with the Office of Paymaster General, and for making other Provisions in regard to the consolidated Offices.

items.title: Assessionable Manors Award Act 1848
items.description: An Act to confirm the Awards of Assessionable Manors Commissioners, and for other Purposes relating to the Duchies of Cornwall and Lancaster.

items.title: Inclosure Act 1848
items.description: An Act to further extend the Provisions of the Act for the Inclosure and Improvement of Commons.
